model_name: HSSB SVR Multi-feature RUL Prediction Model
paper_title: Application of spectral kurtosis and support vector regression for high-speed shaft bearing prognostics
limitations: This is a small demo/reproduction model built from a single run-to-failure trajectory, not an engineering-grade fleet RUL model.
Raw RUL is the primary prediction. Clipped RUL is included only as a display-safe engineering guard.
The packaged inference path currently supports only the .mat vibration format used by the local training code.
